goals: Explore the workspace directory to discover what files related to post-Soviet state symbols are available
Read the contents of relevant files to understand the available research materials
Create a new file to document or organize findings about post-Soviet flags and heraldry

user_agent_config.personality: Methodical and detail-oriented, with a scholarly interest in historical symbols. Prefers systematic exploration before drawing conclusions.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Expert in flags and heraldry of post-Soviet states but unfamiliar with the workspace tool system. Does not know tool names or internal APIs.

end_condition: The user has explored the workspace, reviewed available materials, and created a new file to document their research findings.
